title: Media and news
objectives: Talk about news and media consumption
grammar_notes: 'noticias' (always plural in this sense) = 'the news' (as in TV news). 'una noticia' = a single news item.
'la radio' is feminine; 'el radio' often means the appliance or radius in some dialects.
example_phrases: Veo las noticias todas las mañanas.
El titular dice que el gobierno aprobó la ley.
Sigo a varios periodistas en redes sociales.
